\tzpentry{ID3323}{Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3323 introduces Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \theta_i &= \frac{2 \pi i}{ \varphi} \\ \phi_i &= \arccos \left(1 - \frac{2(i - 1/2)}{n} \right) \\ \mathbf{p}_i &= ( \sin \phi_i \cos \theta_i, \sin \phi_i \sin \theta_i, \cos \phi_i) \end{align}
